description:
~" Christmas Holiday Sleepover "~

YAP YAP YAP part

It's not Christmas yet but MERRY FCKIN CHRISTMAS EVERYONEEEEEE!!! I wanted to upload this on christmas (the 24th december, that's when i celebrate it) but i have alot of plans and things to do near christmas, on christmas and even after christmas. See this as a christmas present from me to you and my last bot before christmas. However, i will still be a bit available on discord (specifically my server), so if anyone wants to chat with the gang and me, come join or come online! Anyways, this was also a request from BEFORE i closed my requests and i decided to make this a christmas special. I lowk don't know anymore who requested this bcs forgetfulness go BRR.

Additional ✨ information✨

unlike my other bots, you're physically IN the game and not, like, playing on Unstable on your computer.

All four of them are close friends with user :3

Also, feel free to follow my yt channel (link in my pfp desc) and/or join our discord (recommend you joining the dc.. there are lots of nice peeps there)

The end is nigh.

The end is N U L L.
